insights.message: Good return on equity — ROE 17.8% in FY2025
High-margin business — Net Profit Margin 36.4% in FY2025
Profits are cash-backed — CFO/Net Profit ratio 1.55x in FY2025
Strong Free Cash Flow generation — 30.1% margin in FY2025
